item.title: Fleet management — multi-agent dashboard
steps: Implement agent discovery: find running ClawHQ agents on the network or from config
Implement aggregated health view: per-agent status summary
Implement aggregated cost view: total spend across fleet
Implement aggregated security view: posture comparison across fleet
Implement `clawhq fleet doctor` to run doctor across all agents
acceptanceCriteria: `clawhq fleet` shows aggregated health, cost, and security across all agents
`clawhq fleet doctor` runs diagnostics on all discovered agents
Per-agent drill-down is available from fleet view
